programme.title: Leverage

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The crew tries to get a corrupt mixed martial arts promoter to invest in a fake cable television network.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Izzy puts her and Bull's upcoming wedding on hold when Bull jeopardizes Benny's election campaign by having TAC handle the corruption trial defense of the former District Attorney whom Benny is running to replace.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull and the TAC team must call upon all of their collective experience to locate Bull's kidnapped daughter; Bull begins to suspect the captor is someone connected to his past.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A client is on trial for going public with classified government documents; Bull experiences emotional turmoil following his daughter's kidnapping.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: TAC represents a man charged with his high school girlfriend's murder after a documentary depicts him as the prime suspect in the decades-old homicide.

programme.title: ION Plus
programme.desc: ION Television is "Positively Entertaining"

programme.title: Ender's Game
programme.desc: After an alien invasion, an unlikely recruit commands Earth's forces and fights for the future of humanity.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: Divergent
programme.desc: In a world divided by factions based on virtues, Tris learns she's Divergent and won't fit in.

programme.title: The Divergent Series: Insurgent
programme.desc: Tris must confront her inner demons and fight against an alliance which threatens to tear her society apart.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Post Impact
programme.desc: In 2012, a meteorite collides with Earth, unleashing an ecological catastrophe that destroys civilization and tosses the planet into a bleak ice age. There are pockets of survivors, however, spread across the snowy planet. Among them is Capt. Tom Parker (Dean Cain), former head of security at the U.S. Embassy in Berlin, and his second-in-command, Sarah Henley (Joanna Taylor), who lead a team of scientists on an expedition into Europe to find whatever survivors there may be.

programme.title: Ninja: Shadow of a Tear
programme.desc: After his wife is brutally murdered, a martial-arts master (Scott Adkins) teams up with an old friend (Kane Kosugi) to sharpen his battle skills and seek revenge.

programme.title: American Yakuza
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen ("Green Book") stars as an undercover FBI agent who has risen through the ranks of the Yakuza and now finds himself caught in a war between the Yakuza, the mob and the FBI.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Following a traumatic experience, former Special Forces member Dean Cage (Wesley Snipes) is trying to pick up the pieces of his fractured life. With the help of detective Amy Knight (Jacqueline Obradors), Dean tries to block out the painful wartime memories, including the death of his best friend. Everything goes awry, however, when Dean is mistaken for a rogue CIA agent. He is abducted and given a truth serum, and now he must find an antidote to the debilitating psychotropic drug.

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
programme.desc: When Russia's first nuclear submarine malfunctions on its maiden voyage, the crew must race to save the ship.

programme.title: Flyboys
programme.desc: World War I aerial battles

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Terrorists seize the White House; ex-agent fights to save the President.

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: World leaders targeted at London funeral; only one bodyguard can stop it.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: A father finds himself unemployed and decides to turn his home into a day care.

programme.title: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Craig Sheffer and Brad Pitt star as two brothers who rebel against their stern father and become men in the majesty of the Montana wilderness.

programme.title: Glory
programme.desc: The saga of the first black fighting unit in America s civil war is an inspiring testament to courage, the human spirit, and the value of freedom. Edited for Television

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Powerful story about three brothers struggling to stay together and the woman who comes between them.

programme.title: The Long Gray Line
programme.desc: The prospect of a forced retirement prompts a longtime athletic trainer to recall how he became a West Point institution.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes To Washington
programme.desc: James Stewart takes on the powers-that-be in our nations capitol in Frank Capras timeless classic. Nominated for eleven 1939 Oscars, including best picture.

programme.title: From Here To Eternity
programme.desc: The original Pearl Harbor movie provides a torrid look at military life just prior to the bombing of Pearl Harbor, with remarkable performances from Frank Sinatra, Montgomery Clift, Burt Lancaster, Donna Reed and Deborah Kerr.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: A naval lieutenant is court-martialed for seizing command of a minesweeper from a neurotic commander (Humphrey Bogart).

programme.title: Red Headed Stranger
programme.desc: Revisionist western about fallen preacher Shay, who guns down his wife Raysha for running off with another man. Wandering, he meets single mom Laurie. However, helpless sheriff Scoby wants Shay to help him fight the villainous Clavers

programme.title: The Marksman
programme.desc: With vicious drug cartel assassins on their heels, a hardened border town rancher (Liam Neeson) helps a young boy escape to safety across America.

programme.title: Bloodfist
programme.desc: Don Wilson plays retired kickboxer Jake Raye, who travels to Manila, where his brother is favored to win a kickboxing competition.

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: From director Steven Soderbergh comes this suspenseful and provocative tale of intrigue starring Channing Tatum, Rooney Mara and Jude Law, and Catherine Zeta-Jones. After her husband (Channing Tatum) is released from prison, Emily (Rooney Mara) begins suffering from terrifying anxiety and turns to psychiatrist Dr. Banks (Jude Law) for help. But when Banks prescribes an experimental drug for her, the side effects have chilling and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Escape Plan: The Extractors
programme.desc: Ray Breslin is hired to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a Hong Kong tech mogul from a Latvian prison.

programme.title: Rambo
programme.desc: When a group of aid workers disappears, John Rambo accompanies a group of mercenaries on a rescue mission.

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: Rambo must confront his past and unearth his ruthless combat skills to exact revenge in a final mission.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The world's authority on structural security accepts a job to break out of an ultra-secret, high-tech facility

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
programme.desc: When one of his team members goes missing, Ray Breslin must return to the hell he once escaped from.

programme.title: Reawakening
programme.desc: John and Mary have lived in grief for ten years because their child, Clare, disappeared when she was fourteen. When Clare mysteriously returns, John suspects she's not who she claims to be, plunging the couple into a search for the truth.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: The Ming Dynasty Assassin
programme.desc: In the waning years of the Ming dynasty, influential eunuch Wei Zhongxian extends his corrupt control over state affairs for selfish gain.

programme.title: Wolf Pack
programme.desc: A physician is forced to join an elite mercenary unit in the hopes of uncovering the truth about his father's death. Soon, the group discovers a dangerous conspiracy that can threaten the lives of millions.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: The life story of Yip Man, the first person to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Master Ip, a new arrival in British-occupied Hong Kong, wants to open a martial arts academy to teach his unique Wing Chun style. A corrupt group of martial arts masters, led by Master Hung refuses to allow him to teach in peace until he proves himself as a kung fu master.

programme.title: The Girl in the Bathtub
programme.desc: A psychological drama inspired by the true story of Julia Law.

programme.title: Trapped: The Alex Cooper Story
programme.desc: Based on the heartbreaking true story.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Two women both seduced and controlled by Drew Peterson share their stories.

programme.title: A Killer in My Home
programme.desc: Allison Winters' life crumbles as husband dies, exposing a secret family.

programme.title: The Girl in the Bathtub
programme.desc: A psychological drama inspired by the true story of Julia Law.

programme.title: Trapped: The Alex Cooper Story
programme.desc: Based on the heartbreaking true story.

programme.title: Love at the Ranch
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a big-city reporter and a ranch owner as she researches the life of a romance novelist.

programme.title: Midnight Stallion
programme.desc: JACK and his daughter TERESA train a wild horse in hopes of winning enough money to save their farm.

programme.title: Angel and the Bad Man
programme.desc: A notorious gunfighter renounces violence upon falling in love with a Quaker woman, but must pick up his guns again when an old foe returns.

programme.title: Wild Faith
programme.desc: A Civil War vet makes peace with his losses and starts a new life with the world resisting change around him.

programme.title: Stagecoach The Texas Jack Story
programme.desc: After retiring from his life as an outlaw, ranch owner Nathaniel Reed (Trace Adkins) quietly leads an honest existence with his devoted wife, Laura Lee.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: Traffickers
programme.desc: Tiffany Cooper, disgraced by the military, wanted by the cops and running out of time, stops at nothing to take down a Trafficking Operation and save these young girls. Nothing is what it seems when everyone seems to be against you. Trust No One.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: American Honey
programme.desc: Star (Sasha Lane), an adolescent girl from a troubled home, runs away with a traveling sales crew that drives across the American Midwest selling subscriptions door-to-door. Finding her feet in this gang of teenagers, one of whom is Jake (Shia LaBeouf), she soon gets into the group's lifestyle of hard-partying nights, law-bending days and young love.

programme.title: GRIT
programme.desc: Three estranged brothers, Jason Jarell, and Josiah, are brought together by their sister Laura’s death. The brothers make a pact to uncover the truth behind her murder, setting off a perilous journey into the dark political world, where they forge unexpected alliances in order to get justice for Laura.

programme.title: The Devil Came to Duval
programme.desc: After surviving a suicide attempt, comedian Eli Thompson faces his past on his birthday, but a night out at the bar spirals into chaos when the Devil arrives. Eli must confront betrayal, revenge, and supernatural terror to survive.

programme.title: Taking What's Mine
programme.desc: Jordan Hayes, a decorated Army veteran turned rising political icon is thrown into a harrowing disaster when her journalist husband, Ethan, is captured by a rising terrorist leader, Khalid Rami. Rami will only release Ethan if Jordan helps overturn a new counter terrorism bill. Refusing to fight the red tape and bow to pressure, Jordan takes matters into her own hands and sets out to rescue him herself.

programme.title: ToxiCity
programme.desc: Corey Spencer, the innovator behind the successful ATLUV dating app, navigates a complex personal life. Despite his app's mission, he struggles with love, further complicated by a child support order. A night out leads him to Sierra, an alluring actress who quickly moves in. Their romance sours as Sierra's past as a dancer and her aggressive jealousy come to light.

programme.title: We in This Together
programme.desc: Attorney August marries Daisha, a social climber more interested in his bank account than motherhood. To hide her infertility, Daisha secretly adopts 17-year-old "Lil August," sparking an immediate, violent rivalry. While August dismisses the teen’s lethal behavior as "playful," Daisha finds herself trapped in a house with a son who may be a killer. As she plots to conceive a biological heir, a series of dark secrets and "accidents" leave the family’s survival in question.

programme.title: Don't Miss the Bus
programme.desc: Sierra, a single mother hustles in order to survive with long shifts and grunt work. Her faith is pinned on lottery tickets and men who exploit her vulnerability. When a stroke of luck has the ability to change her future forever, a missed bus stop could mean life or death.

programme.title: Ardennes Fury
programme.desc: ​​As the Battle of the Bulge rages, a U.S. tank unit trapped behind Nazi lines must fight its way back.

programme.title: American Warships
programme.desc: When a fleet of mysterious ships wage war against Earth, the crew of the USS Iowa must prevent armageddon.

programme.title: Abraham Lincoln vs Zombies
programme.desc: As the Civil War rages, President Lincoln undertakes a more daunting task: Destroying the Confederate Undead.

programme.title: Flight World War II
programme.desc: After passing through a storm, passengers and crew on a 757 time-travel to WWII and must help turn the tide.

programme.title: Independents' Day
programme.desc: Aliens invade Earth, tell humans to emigrate to a new planet or die. The President and a militia fight back.

programme.title: Day of the Animals
programme.desc: The depletion of the earth's ozone layer causes animals above the altitude of 5000 feet to begin attacking humans. A group of hikers are trapped in the military quarantine zone, and now must fight their way across the dangerous terrain to safety. Hiker Paul Jenson, a boorish advertising executive, complicates matters by deciding that he should take charge and go a separate way.

programme.title: Red Scorpion
programme.desc: A Soviet Special Forces soldier is sent on a mission to infiltrate an African rebel army and assassinate its leader, but the war machine they trained starts to think for himself.

programme.title: Auntie Lee's Meat Pies (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Auntie Lee and her quartet of voluptuous nieces are known for making the tastiest meat pies around, all from Aunties top-secret recipe which calls for a most unusual type of meat: human. In order to acquire the juiciest flesh, the girls employ their lusty charms; luring unsuspecting male strangers into a carnal - and deadly - trap, in which theyre chopped, quartered, and minced. Everything is going just peachy for Aunties little family, despite the occasional misbehaving of Larry, their simple helper, but when the girls lure a freaked-out rock group over to have for dinner, things run the risk of getting out of control. And what about the perpetually snooping Police Chief Koal?

programme.title: Humanoids From The Deep (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A race of scientifically created half-human, half-salmon monstrosities lay siege to a Pacific Northwest fishing village. In horrific fashion, the mutated creatures kill the men and mate with the women in order to reproduce. Can the Humanoids From the Deep be stopped before they destroy mankind as we know it?Soundtrack scored by Oscar-winning composer James Horner (Avatar, Titanic, Braveheart). Creature design from Oscar-winning make-up artist Rob Bottin (Total Recall, The Thing, Robocop, Se7en).

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A comic book artist for Tales From the Crypt finds his gruesome drawings coming to life after his wife meddles with his work. As bizarre murders mirror his art, he's caught between reality and fantasy in a twisted, darkly comedic horror tale.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A two-faced sideshow freak discovers his origins when a greedy carnival owner buys a mysterious Egyptian mummy. Their fates intertwine in a darkly comic twist, revealing a bizarre family connection and a macabre inheritance.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A woman witnesses a brutal murder from her window, but shock leaves her unable to speak. Her husband calls a doctor-who is secretly the killer. Trapped in silence, she must find a way to warn someone before it's too late.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A brash TV host films a live special inside a supposedly haunted house, mocking the supernatural. As eerie events escalate, his skepticism turns to terror when he realizes the spirits are real-and they've been waiting for him.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Conjoined twins Eddie and Frank share everything-except personalities. When a doctor offers to separate them, greed, jealousy, and betrayal surface, leading to a darkly ironic twist where the wrong brother pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A wealthy couple adopts a sickly orphan, promising him a mysterious "secret" when he turns 18. As his health improves, he grows suspicious of their intentions-until a chilling twist reveals a monstrous truth neither expected.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Electrician Niles Talbot has been promoted to executioner. When the death penalty is abolished in his state, Niles loses his job. But he decides to become a vigilante, punishing criminals that are released by justice system.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Elizabeth kills her second husband for his insurance money. Upon getting rid of the body, she is attacked by an escaped mental patient dressed as Santa Claus. She soon fears that her young daughter may be Santa's next victim.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A carnival daredevil is buried alive for his grand finale. He tells the viewers how he had undergone a doctor's experiment to transfer a cat's nine lives to him. He suddenly remembers that he may have miscounted just how many lives he has left.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Sylvia Vane is a young, narcissistic prostitute, "sells" her beauty to a voodoo-dabbling pawnbroker so that she can use the money to snag a rich bachelor, Ronnie Price. She soon regrets it when her face begins to unexpectedly age rapidly.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Peggy and Charles, newlyweds end up spending the night inside a decrepit mansion after a car accident. Charles plans to kill Peggy for her inheritance, but he soon learns that Peggy's family has a dark past. Peggy is not who she seems to be.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An uptight elderly man named Jonas is forced into retirement, and soon discovers his wife Anita's obsession with adopting animals into their home, leading him to use the animals for a hobby of his own.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In 1950, gold-digging secretary Cathy Finch marries Charlie Marno, an overweight, unhygienic, and grotesque slob of a man after being told by a fortune teller, Madame Vorna, that he will die shortly after inheriting a large sum of money.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A dying elderly bachelor proposes to his crush, but is rejected for his age. He ends up meeting a discredited doctor who helps him switch bodies. In the end he discovers that his crush's affection comes at a price he cannot afford.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno Crevice and Sam Forney, a pair of rival gamblers who hate each other with a passion, face off in a series of increasingly dangerous and gruesome games in order to see who will leave town when all is said and done.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: Yellowneck
programme.desc: Location shooting in the Florida Everglades add to this dramatic tale of five Confederate deserters trying to get to Cuba. First, they must overcome snake bites, unfriendly Seminoles, and their own conflicts with each other. How many of the five will actually make it out alive? Lin McCarthy, Stephen Courtleigh, and Berry Kroeger star in this little known example of 1950s independent filmmaking.

programme.title: The Lucky Texan
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this vintage western. He and George Gabby Hayes strike it rich with a gold mine, only to find their lives complicated by women and crooked officials. Things get even messier when the good guys are framed for murder! Its all action here, particularly since legendary stuntman Yakima Cannut stars as one of the films heavies. Who will win the fight over the gold and the girl? Directed by Robert N. Bradbury for Monogram Pictures. Also starring Barbara Sheldon. (The film was also known as Gold Strike River.)

programme.title: Wagon Trail
programme.desc: The son of Sheriff Clay Hartley, of the frontier town Elder, has gotten into bad company and hangs out with an outlaw gang in which, Collins, owner of the Golden Rule Saloon, is the secret head. Sheriff Hartley suspects him, but has been unable to gather the needed evidence. Collins instructs his gang, including young Hartley, to hold up the stagecoach on its return trip from Missionary Flats and take the cargo of gold dust it is carrying. Sheriff Hartley is notified of the planned holdup by one of his deputies who has been spying on Collins, and organizes a posse. A deputy-sheriff is killed in the ensuing gunfight between the lawmen and the outlaws, but Deputy Joe Larkin, pursues and captures Clay Hartley Jr. The latter is quickly tried and convicted of the killing of the deputy, and sentenced to be hung. Sheriff Hartley has only a few hours to prove his son was not the killer. He enlists the aid of Collins' step-daughter, Joan, who is in love with Hartley's son.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Dad Longworth robs a Mexican bank, takes the loot, and leaves his partner Rio to be captured. However, Rio escapes capture and searches for Dad in California.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An unholy alliance! Marking the feature film debut of one of Hollywoods most influential and widely referenced auteur directors, Sam Peckinpah, The Deadly Companions centers on a redemptive journey to escort a funeral procession through dangerous Indian Territory. Featuring fine work from a top-notch cast that includes the inimitable Maureen OHara at the height of her illustrious career, Peckinpahs first foray into film provides a promising glance into the energetic and violent nature of his iconic later works.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: For a decade, the white settlers and the Apaches have been engaged in a bloody war with no peaceful end in sight. When a white scout, Tom Jeffords (James Stewart), has a dangerously close but enlightening encounter with the natives, he begins to see the humanity in these enemies. Entering the Apache territory seeking peace, Jeffords forms a friendship with the Apache leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), although there are people on both sides who resist extending the olive branch.

programme.title: Decision At Sundown
programme.desc: Hell-bent on revenge, flinty gunslinger Bart Allison (Randolph Scott) rides into a sleepy Western town with one goal in mind: to kill local roughneck Tate Kimbrough (John Carroll), who kidnapped his wife years ago. Both men have blood on their hands over the woman's eventual suicide. Allison and Kimbrough, wracked with guilt but boiling over with bloodlust, are set to face off for one final confrontation. Tensions mount as sunset approaches, and the townspeople must choose sides.

This documentary contains exclusive interviews with living legends D.L. programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon joins Clinton Kelly and Stacy London for a July Fourth-themed episode where he teaches the notoriously non-cooking Stacy how to grill skirt steak with a quick charred corn salsa featuring tomatillos, jalapeños, and garlic. The episode showcases fundamental cooking techniques including seasoning, temperature control, and proper resting. Stacy surprises the group with an air fryer and attempts to make dairy-free s'mores using gluten-free cookies and specialty peanut butter cups, leading to comedic mishaps. The hosts also discuss their new show "Why'd They Wear That," where they critique character wardrobes from films and television. The episode emphasizes that cooking is about patience, proper technique, and feeding people you care about.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: For the Fourth of July, Michael Symon showcases his approach to smoked ribs, starting with a custom cherry BBQ sauce made from cherry juice, sherry vinegar, molasses, bourbon, cold brew coffee, and warm spices. He explains his smoking technique at 300-325°F for two and a half hours, finishing the ribs on the grill for char and caramelization. Meanwhile, Liz Symon prepares a tart cherry Negroni—an equal-parts cocktail featuring gin, Campari, sweet vermouth, tart cherry juice, and a splash of seltzer. The episode balances savory and sweet as the hosts discuss rib texture preferences, ideal side dishes, and the versatility of the cherry sauce.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly kick off July 4th week with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, a returning favorite from the Rachael Ray Show who pioneered the "Watermelon Palooza" segment. Together they prepare summer cookout essentials: Watermelon Aperol Margaritas with frozen fruit ice, a Watermelon Cucumber Salad served in an artfully carved watermelon bowl, and taste-test limited-edition Lay's World Cup chips. The episode celebrates simple, accessible recipes perfect for backyard gatherings, with Donnarumma sharing pro tips on watermelon carving and ingredient selection while the hosts discuss recipe inspiration and kitchen mood-boosters.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Matt Sese" - Matt Sese, personal trainer and operator of the Row DTLA community gym comes by the temporary studio for a meal from Dave.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Jay Gordon" - Dave cooks a meal for Jay Gordon, founder of the legendary streetwear and fashion destination Bodega, which might just have a location in the Row DTLA, if you know where to look.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Zach Brooks & Fernando Lopez" - Dave further refines his fried egg and potato chip dish, and tries to recreate a dish from Wu's Garden, his childhood favorite dish for Zach Brooks, the GM of Smorgasburg LA and his friend Fernando Lopez, owner of I Love Micheladas.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Chicken-Bacon-Ranch “Larb”: Andrew prepares a dish from Dinner Time Live that is a testament to ranch dressing. More specifically, a testament to the holy trinity of chicken, bacon, and ranch. This riff on larb is full of flavor and meat. "Riff” because larb is the national dish of Laos — as well as a very popular dish in northern Thailand — and this is by no means an authentic larb. But… is it delicious? Yeah, it is.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - The 'Mu Shu Denver' and Plum Upside Down Cake: Chris and Andrew (with the help of Andrew's daughter) put together the breakfast crowd-pleaser 'Mu Shu Denver,' an inspired concoction of all the best breakfast foods from the New York Diner episode of Dinner Time Live; Andrew makes the Plum Upside Down Cake from the Summer Menu episode.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Caesar Salad & Fettuccini Alfredo: Chris and Andrew cook two inviting recipes from the Classic Comforts menu of Dinner Time Live: Creamy fettuccine Alfredo and a Caesar salad packed with umami. These classics are a comforting and exceptional balance of heavy and light that will put you at ease.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Lobster, Corn & Melon Salad, Spicy Seafood Boil, Ramen Rockefeller: Andrew makes the refreshing Lobster, Corn & Melon Salad from the Summer Menu episode of Dinner Time Live; Chris and Andrew make the Spicy-Tingly Seafood Boil and Ramen Rockefeller from the Epic Combos episode.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Pumpkin Spiced Beef Curry & Popcorn Soup - Chris and Andrew make a delicious pumpkin spice beef curry, based on the dish David Chang made for his guests during the Pumpkin Spice episode of Dinner Time Live. Rather than using duck confit, the guys decided to make it more practical for the home chef by using a big 'ol chuck roast.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Extending from California and the Pacific Northwest to Korea, Japan, and Southeast Asia. Explosively flavored grilled meats with exotic herbs and spices, chilies and umami-rich fish and soy sauce are paired with healthy vegetables—barbecue as health food. Vietnamese and Thai influences make the ultimate street food. Steven visits Jenee Kim for grilled beef short ribs.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Fish Hits the Fire. Steven walks you through the grilling process—from whole fish to fire-roasting shellfish. Singapore-spiced halibut grilled in banana leaves. Whole fish with Indonesian flavors by Rafael Lunetta, in Santa Monica. Alaskan salmon riffs on Russian coulibiac, with a stuffing of grilled onions, mushrooms, rice and smoke. Finally, grilling fresh oysters with Asian aromatics.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The deep connection between wine and barbecue dates back millennia. In the Santa Ynez, grape vines are used as fuel and wine for marinades, sauces. Jidori-breed chicken breasts stuffed with ham and dry-aged cheese. Grilled flank steak with Pinot Noir mushroom sauce grilled. Chef John Cox from the Bear and Star restaurant smokes a whole bourbon-soaked wagyu strip loin.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: How about upping your grill game with steaks you may not be familiar with, such as secreto or spinalis dorsi? Secreto is a hyper-flavorful steak cut from a hog’s belly with a grilled vegetable sauce, romesco. Spinalis dorsi the most delectable part of a rib roast reborn as a steak, and grilled with bourbon. And grill a brisket steak fragrant with sizzling shallot sage butter.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Looking back to when our ancestors grilled in the fireplace, on stones around the campfire and directly on the embers, Primal Grilling will make you a barbecue rock star. Try ember-grilled bread roasted vegetable salad, chicken hanging in midair over a smoky fire, and amaretti-stuffed pears grilled on primordial slabs of salt, grilling techniques as old as humankind itself.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Most barbecue enthusiasts can name the big three of barbecue: Kansas City ribs, Carolina pulled pork, and Texas smoked brisket. But what about some of the lesser-known styles? Cornell chicken was created by a Cornell University poultry scientist and today served in upstate New York. Up in Anchorage, Alaska, we have sweet yet smokey barbecued salmon.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Everyone knows that a good barbecue makes the perfect prelude to the game. In this show, we explore how my home state of Florida reimagines three tailgate classics. Get ready for pork shooters stuffed with shrimp, cheese and sausage, wings blasted with fire water, and smoky hamburgers like you’ve never experienced. The secret? Lace them with chopped barbecued brisket.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show celebrates the holy BBQ trinity of barbecue: pork ribs, brisket, and pulled pork. America's favorite ribs—baby backs—are glazed with an unexpected ingredient. Beef brisket and baked beans star in crispy grilled tostadas. An amazing BBQ Titans' brisket with espresso in the barbecue sauce. Finally, pulled pork marinated in an umami-rich Korean chili paste called gochujang.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show goes whole hog! Up first, pastrami bacon made by brine-curing pork belly, rubbing it with a pastrami rub, and finally slow-smoking it over hardwood. Then an apple cider-based brine and rum-spiked finishing glaze pork chops. Next, "pork and beans" like you've never seen them. Finally, rings of sweet onions are doused with hot sauce, spiraled with bacon, and crisped over the fire.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Smoke is the soul of barbecue. In this episode, you'll learn how to smoke duck breasts. Cherry salsa underscores duck's affinity for fruit. Vegetarians and meat eaters will devour our cheese and bean-stuffed poblanos and smoked mushroom bread pudding. But if it's carnivores you're feeding, smoke a hefty awe-inspiring beef shoulder clod. A tangy mustard barbecue sauce makes the perfect complement.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Poultry is one of the most versatile meats to cook over fire. From the Republic of Georgia comes tabaka, citrusy butterflied chickens grilled under a press with piquant Rhubarb Tkemali sauce. From Fez, grilled chicken and onion kebabs marinated in Charmoula. Pound cake gets the grill treatment with fresh berry "salsa" and whipped cream. Finally, a smoke-roasted turkey with butter and truffles.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: A show to stoke our insatiable appetite for fiery foods, starting with smoky Nashville Hot Wings. From rural Kentucky come smoky grilled pork shoulder steaks to dunk in incendiary vinegar cayenne pepper sauce. For more pain, we present Piri Piri Prawns grilled in the shell with a distinctive hot sauce, followed by Indian Tandoori Lamb served with Hell's Fury Hot Sauce and cucumber yogurt raita.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: A show devoted to the most awesome cut of meat to grill: steak. Up first, a magisterial Wood-Grilled Beef Tomahawk Steak topped with Pt. Reyes Blue Cheese Butter. Followed by a four-finger thick Cherry-Smoked New York Strip Steak. Then a plancha-seared "steak" from the sea: Bacon-Wrapped Albacore Tuna "Filet Mignons" sauced with Peppercorn Cream Sauce.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Victory will be yours! Start the party with chicken legs smoke-roasted over maple wood, then glazed with a fiery fusion of maple syrup and sriracha. A quartet of grilled and smoked beans appears in a colorful side dish. Next up, a trio of internationally-inspired burgers: inside-out American-style burgers; Greek-style spiced lamb burgers; and kaffir lime-scented Thai veal burgers.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT mid-century bungalow picks up steam and the change is amazing. America's Top Lifestyle Expert Mar Jennings and his team love seeing their plans come to life. And when it's a hands-on project, Mar can't resist being inspired by his favorite '70's bionic TV heroes.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Bungalow transformation is complete and ready to reveal. It's down to the wire on finishing this home in time for an open house. Yvonne and Mar have overseen all the construction and renovation, but now there's a rush to finish the staging.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT street comes to a halt when Mar's own home suffers some unexpected damage. But that means an all-new kitchen. Team Mar may not be able to cope with this one, especially when the project seems to keep on growing.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: After a water leak forced Mar to make an emergency renovation to his own kitchen, work began with a design palette all inspired by a fish. Now Mar is ready to finish it up, but takes a break to throw out the first pitch at a game. Hopefully his aim will be true.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: All the worlds a stage when you're an amazing home stager. Watch a gorgeous new construction get staged to sell as only Mar can do it. This home references the past, and time travel is definitely a theme.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Our blooper show returns. We work hard to make this show just for you. But it doesn't always go smoothly, and this is your chance to see for yourself. All the crazy antics we didn't show from Season 2.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: You won't believe what I and my team do to this space in the biggest kitchen renovation this season. My neighbor Barbara is in for the kitchen of her dreams. Watch it all unfold.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Our season 2 finale. Mar and his team celebrate their final reveal and all of season 2. The momentum of the entire show season come together for the perfect send-off. Plus we get to meet Daisy, the newest resident of the makeover street.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar takes Mary Alice—new to Westport—and he just sold her a new condo. He takes her through his Casual Luxury transformation of her new condo step-by-step. Remove walls? Check! Add rooms? Check! Take some risks? Check! A total renovation that requires many hands—and dancing feet—to get to the finish line. But what will she think?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mary Alice's new condo has gone through many changes on each floor and in every room. Removing walls and adding space has revealed a Casual Luxury environment. After months of renovations and many design decisions, it's time to finally reveal to Mary Alice her new Wonderland. With so much at stake, it's fingers crossed!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: This home on Punch Bowl Drive in Westport is spacious in every way—except the kitchen. Stuck in its 1970's profile, it feels cramped and ready for a renovation. Mar redesigns this dated kitchen to meet the needs of a 21st-century family. Every bit of space is meticulously reworked with Casual Luxury for function and entertaining.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: There is no place like home but with a break in the design schedule, there's time for an upgrade. So Mar is finally addressing his primary bedroom (and bathroom) at his home Rosebrook Gardens. With space at a premium, how will the wish list for a wall of jaw-dropping built-in closets and more be possible? It's gonna take more than a Casual Luxury design to create the perfect space.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: After Mar finishes his Primary Bedroom reveal to the team they finally see the new primary bath—the oasis of his dreams, an extraordinary use of the space. It's the perfect complement to his new bedroom and brand new built-in storage. Watch his journey renovating his en suite in Casual Luxury style.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar's real estate business is booming and the MARket is hot! When he lists a charming, renovated 1880's home, the family is already out—and so are their furnishings. So he creates Casual Luxury from room to room as usual, this time with a staging partner to help transform the space. Does he get the offers he expects?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: After selling a client's home in Westport, CT, Mar is asked to design their new New York City apartment. The catch? It has to be completed in under 24 hours! From move in to unpacking to staging….the clock is ticking and the client will be back soon—does Casual Luxury work in the Big Apple and in a time crunch?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Paul gets a new client call from people who have just downsized. Their new place is great—except for odd layouts and wasted space. They want Mar's magic touch while they are traveling. Not a small project: a total kitchen and primary bedroom & bath demo and reno in less than a month. Can Mar create the perfect space without the client present? Will they love Mar's Casual Luxury designs?

programme.title: The Wonders of Hawaii

programme.title: A Tranquil Stream
programme.desc: Take in the peaceful, natural beauty of a Pennsylvania stream. Relax as the melodic water flows downstream cradled in the vibrant tree-covered canopy.

programme.title: A Summer Sunset Into Water
programme.desc: Unwind with a beautiful and picturesque New Jersey Shore sunset. Relax as the clouds and birds slowly drift across the sky and the magnificent sun lights the sky on fire.

programme.title: The Wonders of Bali
programme.desc: Bring the exotic sights and sounds of Bali's island paradise into your home with the sounds of nature and beautiful Balinese Music.

programme.title: The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Sit back and relax as you enjoy the sights and the scenes that bring you the colors and moods of the Four Seasons.

programme.title: Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic Collection 2
programme.desc: Join Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic, as he repairs a whole new bunch of vehicles for even more animal friends!

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Goodbye A, Goodbye Z - Super Simple ABCs and more
programme.desc: We're saying, "Goodbye" to all of our friends in Alphabet Village. As the school day ends, take a walk through town, and bid farewell to all of the letters.

programme.title: I Like To Ride My Bicycle (Mr. Monkey) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Let's go on a bike ride with Mr. Monkey and friends as we sing along to this Mr. Monkey version of the original Super Simple Song, "I Like To Ride My Bicycle." This is a great song to introduce during transportation themes! I like to ride my bicycle. I ride it every day. I ride it when I go to school. Or when I want to play.

programme.title: What's Your Name? - Kids Song - Finny the Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny the Shark is saying "Hello" and asking the question "What's your name?" This is a fun song to start the day at preschool! Hello, hello. What’s your name? Hello, hello. What’s your name? My name is Finny! My name is Myrtle! Nice to meet you.

programme.title: Wind The Bobbin Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Wind the bobbin up. Wind the bobbin up. Pull, pull, clap, clap, clap.” Get up and dance with this super fun version of the traditional English nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Finnley, winner of the "One Day Delivery Experience" comes to World Aircraft to go on a delivery with Jett! The delivery takes them to Shanghai, China, where a girl named Yenching needs an action camera to film a cooking video. While Astra is working at her space station, Golden Boy learns that all delivery orders are patched through her satellite. He and Golden Wheels take over the station.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Helen needs a torch pod for the opening torch relay ceremony of the International Children’s Games. She needs the Super Wings to perform the torch relay! When her elephant sanctuary floods in Chiang Mai, Thailand, Kulap orders elephant-sized life jackets and water wings so she can guide the elephants to safety. A baby white elephant is separated from the group and carried away by water currents.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Abu is exploring the excavations at Petra in Jordan with his uncle. But there's a big problem: he forgot to bring along one of his prized toy robots. Jett flies to Erfoud, Morocco, and delivers a fossil detector to a boy named Kamal who wants to find a rare fossil to complete his collection. Jett and Kamal find themselves in an underground lake with a live, ancient whale called a Basilosaurus!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers recycling boxes to George, a young boy who worries that the dirty beaches of Mantanani Island will stop his friend Duggy the Dugong from visiting. Jett, George, and his Grandpa discover an island of rubbish floating in the sea. Jett delivers a telescope to Amélie who is at the Louvre Museum with her mom. Things go awry when the Mona Lisa is stolen...and Amélie's mom disappears, too!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Riley is in Singapore visiting his friend Lifen who is a local movie star. Golden Boy is a huge fan of Lifen's and wants to be in the movie with her.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Maggie wants to be a buddy-cop-duo with her pet Chihuahua, Kiki, and help people in need. So, Jett delivers police costumes and joins them in patrolling the town. Jett flies to Hamburg to deliver a pair of mini vacuum cleaners to help Lars and his Dad clean up a spillage of popcorn across their impressive model village. They have trouble reaching popcorn inside the village's train tunnel.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Peiru and her dad are hiking the Great Wall of China in Beijing. Heavy snowfall has made the Great Wall difficult to traverse, so Peiru orders winter hiking gear. Dale wants to be in an underwater bike race with his dad, and help him win. So Jett delivers a tandem bicycle and agrees to join their team. Things take a turn when Golden Boy enters the race and sends them off-course.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A toddler in South Korea named Ha-Jun has a cold but doesn't like the taste of the medicine that his Dad needs to give him. Ha-Jun's sister Yuna calls the Super Wings for help. A boy named Geir in Iceland goes with his Mom on a tour to see arctic foxes in their natural habitat. Geir orders an arctic fox costume to wear so the shy foxes will come out of their caves and meet him.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a huge inflatable sword to Neele, an accessory for the balloon version of the legendary dragon-fighter Siegfried she is flying with her Papa in the annual balloon festival. Fabio loves soccer but he is not interested in history. At the San Augustin Archeological Park, he accidentally drops his ball into one of the sites with many ancient statues! Jett delivers him a stretchy claw.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Alani notices that the sea level is rising around the island of Tuvalu she orders a huge lifeboat for all the people in her village to ride on. Jett finds himself stuck in ice in Antarctica courtesy of Golden Boy, Golden Wheels, and a giant Golden Robot. He is rescued by World Aircraft and learns that Golden Boy has caused lots of global warming problems around the planet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A passenger airplane bound for Italy has to make an emergency landing on World Aircraft. When Lime offers to prepare a meal for the passengers, Mano, a young boy passenger, makes a popular suggestion: pizza! Ratu and his Dad are excited about a "survival challenge" on one of Fiji's Desert Islands, but they forgot to bring their survival guide to teach them how to filter water!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers flowery mooncakes to Meilin, a young girl who wants to celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival by leaving a gift for the Moon Lady, who is said to descend from the moon according to Chinese folklore. A girl named Emma lives in Transinne, Belgium and she asks the Super Wings if they can help her with her solar system school project.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Astra and Rover continue to help Emma, her Dad, and spaceship Rick see the solar system. Trouble is Golden Boy and Golden Wheels tag along! Jett delivers a claw grabber to Marcia, a little girl playing a treasure hunt game in which she searches for hidden treasure notes in the Rio Abiseo National Park in Peru. Our Super Wing helps her in her search!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter three pandas on a country road in Chengdu, China. They try to help get the pandas off the highway and back to the panda centre. A girl asks the Super Wings for help in locating a dolphin in the waters off Iceland. Jett and Paul deliver a sonar device that can track dolphin whistles.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a princess's dogs need to attend training school she worries that they're too playful to pass. Jett and Donnie deliver some special training suits to help them succeed. When the Super Pets accidentally knock down a birthday piñata at a house outside of Mexico City, Jett and Jerome deliver a huge piñata replacement for the boy's party.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets visit Pisa, Italy where some street cats have made a mess spilling recycling bins. Jett and a new Super Wing called Shine deliver tongs and help with the clean up. The Super Pets are in Pohang, South Korea where they meet a girl whose robot is in need of repairs. Jett and Jerome deliver a much needed repair kit and some robot dance lessons!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets meet a boy in the Serengeti National Park whose ball rolls into an ostrich nest. The mother ostrich thinks the ball is one of her eggs and won't give it back. When a hippo gets stuck on a waterslide at a community swimming pool in Kenya, a boy calls on the Super Wings to deliver a hippo-sized life ring to help free it.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers winter clothes to a little girl living in Egypt's Sahara Desert where a cold snap has left the desert snowy. Jett and Astra show her how to enjoy the snow. After the Super Pets accidentally knock down some Turkish rugs in an Istanbul market, Jett and Ellie deliver a magic lamp that can summon two genies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language! Enjoy upbeat, classical melodies as you learn how to sign words and activities related to common main street businesses, where your food comes from, activities related to dining out and more. Learn through real-life footage, narration, and repetition.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Top 100 Nursery Rhymes - Kids TV
programme.desc: Enjoy the handpicked Top 100 nursery rhymes and children songs by Kids TV. Babies will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning preschool songs like , humpty dumpty, wheels on the bus, finger family, three little kitten, old mac donald, sick song, doctor doctor song, boo boo song, zoo song,i dont want to and much more with their favorite characters.

programme.title: Baby Big Cheese - Kindergarten Popular Nursery Rhymes & Kids Song
programme.desc: Baby Big Cheese is filled with timeless nursery rhymes and beloved baby songs! Enjoy classic melodies that bring joy and laughter. Perfect for Toddlers & Children Education. The Videos are a musical adventure for Babies to sing, dance, and cherish.

programme.title: Baby Lemon - Nursery Rhymes And Kids Songs
programme.desc: Welcome to Baby Lemon, a fun world of nursery rhymes and kids' songs featuring many children's favorite and popular nursery rhyme characters, like Humpty Dumpty, Old MacDonald, and many more. Our animated nursery rhyme videos make learning fun, impart family values & encourage healthy habits while entertaining babies. Preschoolers can learn letters, numbers, animal sounds, colors, shapes & more!

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus Nursery Rhymes For Children - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Wheels on the bus is a nursery rhymes that little babies love! Come join Little Treehouse as they sing, dance in this fun kids educational video with our version of the classic wheels on the bus called the wheels on the bus and many more preschool rhymes for babies like rain rain go away, row row your boat, head shoulder knees and toes and many more

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Welcome to the mystical and of the Little Treehouse! where you are take non magical nursery rhymes journey. Kids will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning kids songs like I spy song, to market to market, animals sounds song, mary had a little lamb, row row row your boat and much, much more while enjoying our friendly characters.

programme.title: Wheels On The Garbage Truck + More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Hey Kids, Little Treehouse is back with more nursery rhymes for toddlers that you will enjoy. Wheels on the Garbage Truck is here to take you on a fun ride where we sing-along, dance and have fun.Come join in this preschool adventure and enjoy it with your friends. Little Treehouse has some amazing animated learning videos and more baby rhymes collection like,Who Stole My Toy, Happy Elephant, Chew Your Food, Doctor Checkup Song, Swimming Song, Peek A Boo, Rock a Bye Baby and many more Kindergarten Songs.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When outlaws chase a sheriff out of a western town, Sonic takes over. But the outlaws are robots built by Robotnik. And when they capture a pretty possum of a saloon girl, Sonic meets Robotnik for a showdown.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: First in a four-part Time Travel series. Robotnik invents a time machine to go back in time and gather four powerful gemstones. His first attempt is on the high seas, but Sonic goes into hyper-Sonic-overdrive, and reverses time to go after him. ...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik timetravels back to Mobigypt, makes himself a pharoah, and enslaves everbody in an effort to find the gemstone of immortality.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads.
